title: Chapter 1672 Amusement Park
content:
Chapter 1672 Amusement Park

Yuan hastily retrieved his Abyssal Dagger to block Li Jinxi's attack.

"So you finally remembered your past life?" Yuan inquired as they clashed.

"I won't say anything until you beat me!" Li Jinxi repeated.

"But you've already said a lot…" Yuan smiled.

However, instead of going all out to defeat her quickly, Yuan was curious to see how strong Li Jinxi had become after a year of training with Kelan and regaining Jin Xi's memories.

Their clashes were so intense that, if not for the formation surrounding the training ground, each strike would have caused the entire mountain to tremble violently.

"I know this is not all you've got!" Li Jinxi said to him a few minutes later when neither of them were gaining an advantage.

"I can say the same to you. You seem weaker compared to our last spar a year ago." Yuan smiled.

"Hmph. If I truly went all out, this mountain would perish in the blink of an eye!"

"Only the mountain? This world would perish if I went all out." Yuan shrugged.

"You will be returning to the Nine Heavens soon, right? Let's postpone our match until then. We can only go all out in the Nine Heavens, anyway," she suggested.

"I can't give an exact date of my return, but it won't be too long. I also agree that we won't be able to fight seriously unless it's within the Nine Heavens, so I don't mind postponing our match until I return."

After a slight pause, Yuan continued with a provocative smile, "It'll give you more time to mentally prepare for your inevitable defeat, too."

"Then it's settled." Li Jinxi said as she stowed away her weapon.

"Are you really not going to say anything until then?" Yuan then asked.

"That's what I said, no?"

Without saying anything else, Li Jinxi left the training ground, leaving Yuan standing there with a dumbfounded face.

After leaving, Li Jinxi returned to her room and stood before a mirror with a perplexed expression on her face.

"So it's real…" she muttered in a dazed voice.

Early in the morning the following day, everyone from the Demon Sealing Faction and three individuals from Eternal Lotuses gathered at the gates of the Dragon Spiral Mountain, where a long limousine picked them up and drove them to the Dragon Spiral Mountain's private airport.

"It's Yuan and the rest of the Demon Sealing Faction! They're finally leaving the Dragon Spiral Mountain!" The people hired by the government to watch over the Dragon Spiral Mountain were shocked to see Yuan and the others leave the mountain, and they quickly notified their superiors.

"When did you buy a private jet?" Yuan asked Meifeng when they arrived at the airport to see a luxurious private jet with the name of their faction printed on its body.

"A few months ago," she said. "We have plenty of money, so you don't have to worry about our finances."

"I am not worried at all. I was just curious." Yuan said with a smile. Even if they were completely out of money, he could easily sell some treasures and gain a fortune.

With the amount of treasures in his possession, as well as what he could acquire, it wouldn't be an exaggeration to say the Demon Sealing Faction was one of the wealthiest in the entire world.

Once they boarded the jet, Meifeng drove it herself. The flight was only an hour long.

When they landed, the group entered another transport vehicle that brought them directly to the amusement park.

"Huh? Why is it so empty? Is the amusement park closed?" Yu Rou muttered out loud after seeing the empty parking lot.

Yuan used his divine sense to peer inside the amusement park and spotted several workers going about their tasks. However, not a single customer was present within the park's grounds.

Meifeng then spoke, "Oh, that's because I reserved the whole amusement park for today, so we're the only ones here."

"Seriously…?" Yu Rou stared at her with wide eyes.

"The experience will be different if we're alone…" Chu Liuxiang sighed.

Meifeng shrugged and explained herself, "In case you forgot, you're all celebrities. If I hadn't done this, we would've been swarmed by people."

Yuan then said, "Although the experience will be different than what I had anticipated, I understand why it was done. I don't really mind it, either. Also, this means we don't need to wait in line for the rides."

"I actually prefer that we're alone since we don't need to deal with anyone," Wang Bingbing said.

Sometime later, they entered the amusement park.

"What should we do first?" Yu Rou asked.

"We have plenty of time to try everything, so why don't we explore the park clockwise?" Yuan suggested.

"Sounds like a plan."

Thus, the group began exploring the park, experiencing every attraction one at a time.

However, several attractions later, Wang Ming sighed out loud, "This is more boring than I'd anticipated. Is it because this park was built for mortals? I don't feel any excitement from the rollercoasters."

As cultivators, their senses had been significantly enhanced, and things like rollercoasters felt like they were moving at a snail's pace. As for the height, it wasn't even worth mentioning.

"It's a little disappointing, but there's nothing we can do about it. After all, this place wasn't made for cultivators." Yuan said.

They continued to explore the amusement park until they experienced all of the attractions.

"Wow, that turned out to be a chore." Shi Lang laughed out loud as they left the amusement park.

"Although there wasn't any blood-pumping and heartstopping excitement, I still had fun. It's like a walk in the park—one that is more elaborate, I guess." Yu Rou said.

"I agree. It wasn't that bad." Chu Liuxiang said.

After leaving the amusement park, they returned to the Dragon Spiral Mountain to have a feast. Since Meifeng's cooking was better than most restaurants out there, they decided to save a trip and dine at home.

"Brother, do you have anything else planned?" Yu Rou asked Yuan as they feasted. Yuan shook his head and said, "Not really, but if there's anything you want to do, don't hesitate to let me know."

"Okay. Let me think about it." she nodded.
